documentation.file_docstring: Normalize a raw message object into a consistent structure.
inline_comments: Detect tool messages by common gateway shapes.
Some tool events come through as assistant role with tool_* items in the content array.
Strip AI-injected metadata prefix blocks from user messages before display.
Preserve original casing when it's already a core role.
Keep tool-related roles distinct so the UI can style/toggle them.
Check if a message is a tool result message based on its role.

functions.name: normalizeMessage
functions.doc: Normalize a raw message object into a consistent structure.

functions.name: isToolResultMessage
functions.doc: Check if a message is a tool result message based on its role.
